query: My manager wants a report on our January sales numbers from the production instance. I need to pull revenue and order count data broken down by day. How do I get this?
I want to see what people are searching for on our storefront — top search terms and their conversion rates. Is there a way to pull search analytics from our commerce data?
I need to run a custom SQL query against our commerce analytics data to calculate average order value by product category for Q4. What data tables are available and how do I query them?

We're preparing for a quarterly business review and I need to export our key performance metrics — conversion rate, average basket size, and bounce rate — into a CSV for the last 90 days. How can I pull that programmatically?

Our marketing team wants to understand which product categories are trending week-over-week. I need to query the analytics data to compare units sold and page views across categories for the past 6 weeks.

I'm investigating a drop in checkout completion rate that started last Tuesday. I need to pull funnel metrics — sessions, add-to-carts, checkout starts, and orders — broken down hourly for the past 10 days so I can pinpoint when it changed.
I need to export Page Designer content pages from our site library. How do I list and export them?
My CLI isn't picking up the client credentials from dw.json. How do I debug the OAuth configuration?
I need to query our product catalog to find all products in the 'electronics' category that have inventory below 10 units. Is there a way to search products via the API?
How do I write a pipeline script that reads product data from the catalog and transforms it for an external feed?
